name: 2026-03-28-overnight-door-open
description: Door open all day (87F high); 555 min comfort violations; outdoor dropped to 53F overnight
notes: This scenario captures natural ventilation cycling from a real activity report (March 28, 2026).
Tests: nat vent at 06:00, pause at 14:00 (afternoon peak), re-activation at 20:00, comfort-floor exit at 23:30.
At 23:30 indoor drops to comfort_heat=70F — Issue #99 comfort-floor exit fires, heat restores.
The outdoor temp (53F) is still below the nat vent threshold, but the indoor comfort floor takes priority.
Promote to golden/ once all assertions pass in production.

events.note: door/window opened, remained open all day
morning temps — outdoor 75F is exactly at threshold (72+3), nat vent should activate
afternoon peak — outdoor 87F well above threshold 75F, must exit nat vent and pause
evening cooldown — outdoor 74F still below threshold 75F, should re-activate nat vent
midnight — outdoor 53F, well below threshold; nat vent should still be active

assertions.reason: sensor opened; outdoor 75F <= comfort 72F + delta 3F = 75F threshold — nat vent mode
outdoor 87F > threshold 75F with sensors open — must exit nat vent, enter pause
outdoor 74F dropped back to <= threshold 75F while paused — re-activate nat vent
indoor 70F hit comfort_heat floor — nat vent exits and heat restores (Issue #99 behavior)
